name: security-compliance
description: Identity-architecture validator for IAM, CIAM, RBAC, and workload-identity designs — maps OIDC/OAuth/SAML/SCIM/ephemeral-credential patterns to identity controls across 11 regulatory frameworks. Ships an /edit-docx command (apply-template + accept-changes) with rollback-safe versioned promote and per-Word-feature fidelity checks.
